examples: The auger remains in my mind as metaphor of form.
Then I felt the numbing pain of the auger bit crushing my back.
If the auger is operated slowly, we could take out as little as a cubic centimetre of material at a time.
Transportation costs to ship a big auger over here, it starts becoming cost prohibitive.
Looj uses a high-velocity, four-stage auger to blast away leaves, dirt and clogs while brushing gutters clean.
